Sales Video Mechanics
Module 5
Your Sales Video
• Rule #1: Your offer (and your sales video) is all
about the TRANSFORMATION… not the “stuff”
• Rule #2: Refer to Rule #1
• Your video should be as long as it needs to be to
tell your complete story and make your offer and
not one second longer!
• Rough guidelines for Sales Video Timing
• Beginners: 10-20 minutes
• Intermediate: up to 35 minutes
• Expert: up to 40 minutes
• Uber-Pro: up to 50 minutes
Module 6: Sales Video Mechanics
Your Sales Video

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Sales Video Notes
• Do NOT assume that your viewer watched your
Prelaunch Content (the sales video needs to be
complete)
• Paint the transformation
• Before you shoot the video, think about (meditate
on) how your product will transform your
prospects life
• Speak with confidence
Module 6: Sales Video Mechanics
• Look into the camera lens, but don’t stare
• Don’t talk too fast
• Don’t slow down intentionally
• High energy
Module 6: Sales Video Mechanics
Sales Video Notes
• Hide the “Buy Now” button until the “call to action”
• Don’t hide the “Buy Now” button on last day of the
launch
• Test hiding the video controls
• Scarcity banner near end of launch
• Pay attention to check out page
• Sell from power and authority, don’t sell from your
heels
